pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 10: FNAME='Michael' - created by task setup script
setup_task.sh line 11: LNAME='Chang' - created by task setup script
setup_task.sh line 19: provider_no='999998' hardcoded; setup_oscar.sh line 232-234 creates provider 999998 for Sarah Chen
task.json description line 25 mentions 'Physiotherapy' appointment; no verification in database schema or predefined codes found
task.json metadata line 21, task description, setup_task.sh line 64, verifier.py line 88 checks for times starting with '10:00'
task.json metadata line 22, task description line 25 states '30 minutes'
task.json metadata line 23, task description line 27 states 'Number of occurrences: 4 sessions', verifier.py line 62 checks for count == 4
setup_oscar.sh lines 217, 375; task.json description line 24; web search confirms oscardoc is standard OSCAR EMR admin user
setup_oscar.sh lines 210-217 set password hash for oscardoc user to SHA-1('oscar'). Default OSCAR password is 'mac2002' but this environment overrides it to 'oscar'
setup_oscar.sh line 375, task.json description line 24; web search confirms 1117 is the default 2nd level passcode for OSCAR EMR

privileged_info_summary: Patient Michael Chang (synthetic, created by task setup) is to be scheduled for 4 weekly Physiotherapy appointments starting on the first Tuesday after today at 10:00 AM, each 30 minutes long. Provider number 999998 (Sarah Chen). Authentication: oscardoc / oscar / PIN 1117 (password overridden from default by environment setup). All data is synthetic and generated for demonstration in OSCAR EMR Docker environment.
